title: Barely Modded
body:
![pack banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54ac16501edf9ddebe24f5a13c186dbe51483be1_0.webp)
# 🌿 Barely Modded – Vanilla, But Better

**Barely Modded** is a lightweight, client-focused modpack designed for players who love **vanilla Minecraft** but want a subtle upgrade to visuals, performance, and convenience — without losing server compatibility. You can join **any vanilla or lightly-modded server*** with confidence, while enjoying smoother gameplay and a refreshed look.

> 💡 This pack also serves as the client companion to the **[Barely Modded Server Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fantazs-barely-modded-server)**, which expands vanilla with carefully chosen tweaks, mechanic changes, and lightweight content mods for a more feature-rich multiplayer experience.

---

## ✨ Features:
- 🎮 **Vanilla-friendly gameplay:** No intrusive gameplay changes — perfect for purists who want Minecraft to feel “just right.”
- 🌙 **Dark mode interface**: Highly customizable dark GUIs that are easier on the eyes during long play sessions.
- 🔭 **Bobby:** See terrain far into the distance, making the world feel massive without killing performance.
- 🔊 **Better Sound Physics:** Adds subtle depth and realism to Minecraft’s audio for a more immersive experience.
- ⚡ **Optimized performance:** Faster chunk loading, higher FPS, and lightweight optimizations based on _Fabulously Optimized_.
- 🗺️ **Journeymap (toggleable):** Access powerful map tools or disable them with a keybind for a pure vanilla feel.
- 🛠️ **Vanilla Tweaks Downloader:** Quickly browse and apply your favorite tweaks from within the game.
- 🎤 **Simple Voice Chat:** Talk to friends in-game with minimal setup — spatial audio makes conversations feel natural… but be careful what you say in the [Deep Dark 🤫](https://modrinth.com/mod/voice-chat-interaction).

---

Barely Modded is about keeping Minecraft **familiar, smooth, and visually pleasing**, while offering just enough quality-of-life features to make the game more enjoyable — solo or on servers.

*Mostly client-side mods; a few may require support on servers for best compatibility.

<details>
<summary>Allocated RAM</summary>

- Minimum: 4GB
- Recommended: 6-8GB

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits:</summary>

- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)

</details>
